biological_replicate: human vaginal epithelial cells were obtained from ATCC
technical_replicate: the samples were analyzed in triplicate injections
experimental_design: compared the Fc glycosylation of HCA produced in two novel mAb manufacturing platforms
factor_value: HCA produced in two novel mAb manufacturing platforms, namely transgenic tobacco plants (HCA-N) and mRNA-mediated expression in human vaginal cells (HCAmRNA)
number_of_fractions: no fractionation or pre-fractionation is described
number_of_technical_replicates: the samples were analyzed in triplicate injections
